source_pr.title: core_test: add cases that local temporary table works well for cte

symptoms: rows = tk.MustQuery("WITH RECURSIVE cte(a) AS (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT a+1 FROM tmp1 WHERE a < 5) SELECT * FROM cte order by a;") (planner/core/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: rows = tk.MustQuery("WITH RECURSIVE cte(a) AS (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT a+1 FROM tmp1 WHERE a < 5) SELECT * FROM cte order by a;") (planner/core/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: rows = tk.MustQuery("WITH RECURSIVE cte(a) AS (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT a+1 FROM tmp1 WHERE a < 5) SELECT * FROM cte order by a;") (planner/core/integration_test.go).
fix_pattern: rows = tk.MustQuery("WITH RECURSIVE cte(a) AS (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT a+1 FROM tmp1 WHERE a < 5) SELECT * FROM cte order by a;") (planner/core/integration_test.go)

evidence: evidence: rows = tk.MustQuery("WITH RECURSIVE cte(a) AS (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT a+1 FROM tmp1 WHERE a < 5) SELECT * FROM cte order by a;") (planner/core/integration_test.go)
